goal: Apply explicit market-structure intelligence to the Phase22 winner: liquidity sweep, VWAP quality, compression breakout, trend pullback, exhaustion reversal, failed-breakout guard, relative strength, volume quality, candle location, and VWAP distance penalty.

liquiditySweep.description: Stop-run below/above structure followed by reclaim; useful for reversal scalps.

vwapReclaimQuality.description: Clean VWAP reclaim/loss with real volume, strong close, and limited rejection.

compressionBreakout.description: ATR/compression release into clean range expansion and volume confirmation.

trendPullback.description: HTF/EMA trend intact, pullback to EMA/VWAP, then continuation.

exhaustionReversal.description: Extended move, wick rejection, volume climax, and reclaim risk/reward.

relativeStrength.description: Ticker must show relative strength versus market/peer context.

volumeQuality.description: Real accumulation/participation instead of a one-off volume spike.

candleLocation.description: Close location and candle body quality; close near high/low matters most.

vwapDistancePenalty.description: Avoids late chase too far from VWAP unless breakout quality is exceptional.

recommendedChampion.goal: Specialize in clean VWAP/EMA reclaim with close-location and no-chase checks.

balanced.goal: Specialize in clean VWAP/EMA reclaim with close-location and no-chase checks.

highWin.goal: Higher-trade high-win overlay: prefer compression releases without stretched VWAP pressure.

profit.goal: Specialize in clean VWAP/EMA reclaim with close-location and no-chase checks.

vwapReclaim.goal: Specialize in clean VWAP/EMA reclaim with close-location and no-chase checks.

elitePrecision.goal: Ultra-high-win overlay: avoid the Phase22 loss cluster caused by high chop/late VWAP pressure.

highWinGuarded.goal: Higher-trade high-win overlay: prefer compression releases without stretched VWAP pressure.

rankedVariants.goal: Specialize in clean VWAP/EMA reclaim with close-location and no-chase checks.

machineLearningDraft.nextStep: Train route-family logistic/gradient models on canonical features, compare against Phase23 rule engine, and only promote rules that win on chronological holdout plus forward paper.
